query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donor_tiers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tier_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  tier_level INT NOT NULL,
  min_lifetime_giving DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  max_lifetime_giving DECIMAL(12,2),
  benefits TEXT,
  recognition_type VARCHAR(100),
  badge_icon VARCHAR(255),
  color_code VARCHAR(20),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO donor_tiers (tier_name, tier_level, min_lifetime_giving, max_lifetime_giving, benefits, recognition_type, color_code) VALUES
('Friend', 1, 0, 249.99, 'Newsletter updates, Annual impact report', 'Digital recognition', '#6B7280'),
('Supporter', 2, 250, 999.99, 'Friend benefits + Quarterly updates, Name on website', 'Website listing', '#3B82F6'),
('Champion', 3, 1000, 4999.99, 'Supporter benefits + VIP event invitations, Personal updates from leadership', 'Event recognition', '#8B5CF6'),
('Visionary', 4, 5000, 24999.99, 'Champion benefits + Advisory council invitation, Named program sponsorship', 'Program naming', '#F59E0B'),
('Legacy Builder', 5, 25000, NULL, 'All benefits + Permanent recognition, Legacy society membership, Direct leadership access', 'Permanent memorial', '#10B981');
